personas.name: Engaged and Motivated
personas.description: Actively seeks mental health support and tracking
context: has a therapist or mental health professional
constraints: values ease of use and accessibility

personas.name: Frustrated User
personas.description: Experiences technical issues and frustration with the app

personas.name: Skeptical and Critical
personas.description: Questions the app's credibility and effectiveness
goals: validate the app's claims and benefits
pain_points: concerns about data sharing and security
context: may have had negative experiences with mental health services
constraints: may have limited knowledge of mental health resources

personas.name: Casual and Interested
personas.description: Interested in mental health tracking but not actively engaged
goals: gain insights into emotions and behaviors
pain_points: limited motivation to track mental health
context: may have limited knowledge of mental health resources
values ease of use and accessibility
constraints: limited time and effort for tracking

personas.name: Value-Conscious
personas.description: Seeks value and effectiveness in mental health tracking
goals: find a cost-effective mental health tracking solution
gain insights into emotions and behaviors
constraints: limited budget for mental health services
may have limited knowledge of mental health resources
